requires.rationale: Tag attaches to ≥3 distinct entity kinds

structure.description: Tag is a lightweight polymorphic association applicable to multiple entity kinds (dataset, column, dashboard, term). Tag-input control reused across kinds with same UX; tag detail page lists all targets grouped by kind.

rationale.hypothesis: Per-kind tag systems force users to learn N taxonomies. A single shared polymorphic tag namespace makes 'tagged-with-PII' a portable concept across entities.

evidence.description: Same tag attaches to dataset, column, dashboard, glossary term
Multi-select properties shared across databases via relation

counterexample.description: When tags must be scoped to one entity kind for governance, polymorphic attachment leaks semantics

shouldMatch.reason: Tag attaches to Workflow + Node + Execution

shouldNotMatch.reason: Tags only on MoodEntry — single kind
